name: the runner hard-fails (blocks) a required tool that is absent, per the §28.28 operator policy
command: printf 'x\n' > f.md && RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/run-tool.sh" --tool checkov --file f.md --required 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=hard-fail' e.txt && echo hard-fail-1 1>&2
